description:
## What
Allow personas to follow hashtags so that public posts containing those tags appear in the home timeline. Includes followed_hashtags schema, follow/unfollow endpoints, and home timeline query extension.

## Why
Hashtag following is a first-class Mastodon feature (added in 4.x) and expected by Ivory, Elk, and other modern clients. Without it, the hashtag follow UI in those clients silently does nothing.

## Phases covered
- followed_hashtags schema + GET/POST/DELETE /api/v1/followed_tags endpoints
- Home timeline UNION branch for posts containing followed hashtags
title: Hashtag following
